string.text: Dorn's Fast Travel
Dorn's Fast Travel
Travel Preset
Stalker: The full, dangerous experience.\nTourist: Faster travel, no ambushes, no costs, and no stamina drain.
PDA Path Detail
Number of waypoints displayed on the PDA map during travel. Higher values show more detail.
The Final Leg

When enabled, fast travel between different levels will terminate immediately upon entering the destination level. You will be left at the transition border and must walk the remaining distance (the final leg) to your clicked destination.
Travel Wind Sound
Play an immersive wind sound effect during animated travel.
Screen Vignette
Apply a subtle cinematic vignette effect while on the road.
Safe Zone Protection
If enabled, ambushes cannot occur within 100m of your starting or destination points.
Enable Mod
Completely enable or disable all travel mechanics.
Travel Speed
Simulated walking speed in meters per second. Higher values result in faster journeys but higher stamina drain.
Time Acceleration
Scales how quickly the journey completes in real time (15 = default speed). Higher values finish travel faster on the PDA map.
Enable Ambush Tech
If enabled, your journey will be interrupted if your virtual path passes near hostile squads or mutants (Real-Time Threat Detection).
Enable Survival Costs
Apply realistic hunger, thirst, and sleepiness based on the total time spent traveling.
Hunger Drain Scale
Thirst Drain Scale
Sleep Drain Scale
Weather Impact
Rain and storms will slow your travel speed and increase survival costs.
Carry Weight Impact
Being over-encumbered will significantly slow your travel speed.
Stamina Consumption
Traveling long distances is exhausting. If your stamina hits zero, you will be forced to stop and rest.
Show Arrival Summary
Displays distance traveled and time elapsed upon reaching your destination.
Enable Debug Logging
Prints detailed journey information to the game log. Keep disabled unless troubleshooting.
Enable Encounter Dodging

Allows a chance to sneak past detected threats during travel, avoiding journey interruption. Chance scales dynamically based on character rank, time of day (better at night), and weather (better in fog/rain/storms).
Base Sneak Chance
The baseline percentage chance to sneak past an encounter without rank, time, or weather bonuses.
Maximum Sneak Chance
The absolute limit for the total stealth chance, preventing automatic success even with perfect bonuses.
Enable Instant Guide Travel

If enabled, a "Hire guide (instant)" option will be available on base and fast travel spots, bypassing the animated travel sequence for a ruble cost calculated directly from Fair Fast Travel's guide options. (Requires Fair Fast Travel and its TLRA Compatibility Patch)
Arrival Offset
Spawn this many meters before your destination instead of right on it. Helps avoid spawning on top of enemies. Set to 0 to disable and spawn exactly at the destination.
Ambush Spawn Offset
Meters to pull back from the ambush interrupt point along your travel path. Separate from arrival offset.
Message Duration
How long on-screen travel messages stay visible, in seconds.
Weapon After Travel
Which weapon slot to equip after travel completes. Current restores whatever you had out before travelling.
Rank Affects Sneak Chance
When enabled, higher rank adds up to +25%% to ambush dodge chance.
Enable Sneaky Travel Menu
Shows a second PDA travel option that costs more and takes longer but boosts sneak chance.
Sneaky Travel Stealth Bonus
Extra ambush dodge chance (%%) added when using Sneaky Travel.
Sneaky Travel Time Multiplier
Multiplies journey game-time cost for sneaky travel.
Sneaky Travel Cost Multiplier
Multiplies ruble cost for sneaky travel.
You are too wounded to begin this journey.
You must stop the bleeding before traveling.
Road: No path found to that zone.
Road: No transition found to %s
Destination is too close.
You cannot afford this journey (%s RU)
Journey paid via FFT: %s RU
Journey paid: %s RU
Heading to zone border...
The journey begins...
Your guide leads you toward the border...
Your guide leads the way...
Destination zone reached. Travel completed.
Final zone reached - completing journey...
Resuming journey...
Entering zone transition...
, %d RU refunded
Journey aborted at %d%%.%s
You are too exhausted to continue.
Journey interrupted at %d%% — guide has fled!%s
Journey interrupted at %d%%.%s
Destination reached. Distance: %dm. Time elapsed: %dh %dm (Time Factor: %dx).
\nEvents: Survived %d ambushes, found %d positive events.
Travel here (DFT)
Sneaky travel (DFT)
Final leg only (DFT)
Travel to zone exit (DFT)
Zone exit reached. Continue on foot from here.
Travel here (TLRA)
Hire guide (instant)
Free
You push forward through the thick brush...
The wind howls through the dead trees...
The ground is uneven and muddy here...
The zone feels particularly heavy today...
You spot a group of crows circling overhead...
Distant mutants howl in the distance...
You wipe sweat from your brow, keeping your eyes on the horizon...
A rustle in the grass makes you tighten your grip on your weapon...
You pause for a second, admiring the desolate beauty of the Zone...
The distant hum of an anomaly field keeps you on edge...
Your guide signals for you to stay low as you cross the open ground...
"Keep your pace steady," the guide mutters, "we've still got ground to cover."
The guide pauses for a second, sniffing the air, then nods for you to continue...
"I've walked this path a hundred times," your guide says, "it never gets easier."
"Watch your step here," the guide warns, "the ground is softer than it looks."
You find a moment of peace, catching your breath...
The rhythmic sound of your footsteps is almost meditative...
You find a small, forgotten stash of 150 RU in a hollow log.
The sun breaks through the clouds, raising your spirits.
You find a medical stash tucked into a crevice.
You spot an abandoned ammunition crate in the ruins.
You discover a faint shimmer in a patch of grass... an artifact!
The view from this ridge is breathtaking. You take a moment to soak it in.
Stealth Success: Using the cover of night, bad weather, and your %s skills, you silently slipped past a threat (%d%% chance).
Stealth Success: Melding into the pitch-black darkness, your %s instincts helped you bypass a threat (%d%% chance).
Stealth Success: The heavy weather conditions masked your movement as you slipped past a threat (%d%% chance).
Stealth Success: Drawing upon your experience as a %s, you managed to sneak past a threat (%d%% chance).
TLRA: Cleared %d stuck map marker(s).
TLRA: No stuck markers found.
